历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1130 → 1029 → 1162 → 596 → 506, showing an overall forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), especially in the last two years: in 2024, it moved forward by about 566 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, it moved forward by about 90 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 506 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu Province has been continuously shrinking: 196 in 2021 → 191 in 2022 → 190 in 2023 → 143 in 2024 → 128 in 2025 → 110 in 2026, with a reduction of about 14% in 2026 compared to 2025, further intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, consistently ranking 4th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years (2021–2026), belonging to the top-tier universities in China, with strong appeal to high-scoring students; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (high number of retractions) and campus management incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level; historical abnormal admission records only show a negative signal in 2021 (Henan admission line ranked last among the Huawu group), with no significant gaps in recent years. Although there is negative public opinion overall, the application enthusiasm has not significantly cooled; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shanghai Jiao Tong University has 28 disciplines rated A- or above, including Computer Science and Technology (A+), Mechanical Engineering (A+), Materials Science and Engineering (A+), Biology (A+), Business Administration (A+), and Clinical Medicine (A+), all at the top level, highly matching the Physics Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors at SJTU such as Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended) continue to see high social popularity; the number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province has increased from about 166,000 in 2021 to about 261,000 in 2025, with a total of about 521,000 examinees in 2026, estimated at about 380,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 73%, and the continuous expansion of examinee numbers intensifies competition; the provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) has risen from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, showing an overall upward trend; Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, geographically close to Jiangsu Province, with strong regional appeal to Jiangsu examinees; the university considers Jiangsu Province one of the key source provinces for enrollment across the country.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings (intensified competition), the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-14%), the expansion of the Physics Category examinee pool in Jiangsu Province, and the high social popularity of core engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will further move forward from the 2025 baseline of 506. The predicted minimum ranking is about 463, with a range of 407–519.

- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (IEEE Pilot Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Information Engineering, Information Security, Automation)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Talent Class) (Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Information Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Engineering Pilot Class (Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Software Engineering, etc.)
- Science Pilot Class (Mathematics Direction) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Intelligent Medical Engineering Pilot Class) (Biomedical Engineering)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Xu Zuyao Honor Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Finance (including Finance + Computer Science and Technology Dual Degree)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Mechanical and Electrical) (Mechanical, Aerospace Engineering, Smart Energy Engineering)
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering (Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering + Mathematics and Applied Mathematics Dual Degree)
- Science Pilot Class (Physics Direction) (Physics, Astronomy)
- Economics and Management Pilot Class (Economics, Finance, Accounting, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 407–519, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 flagship majors (such as Yongqiang Computer Pilot Class, Artificial Intelligence Top Talent Pilot Class, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 407), focus on impacting Tier 1 top majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 519), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2. Shanghai Jiao Tong University has extremely strong engineering capabilities, and majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Artificial Intelligence, which are A+ disciplines, continue to have high social popularity, leading to fierce competition. It is advisable to reasonably arrange the order of preferences.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for the History Category was approximately 115, and in 2025 it was about 109. Both years' data are in an extremely high ranking range, with rankings basically stable and slightly moving forward. The 2025 baseline is about 109. The university has very few enrollment spots for the History Category in Jiangsu Province: 1 person in 2021, 2 in 2025, and 2 in 2026. The enrollment plan is flat, with limited impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 4th nationally by Soft Science. Its top-tier university level also strongly attracts History Category students. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (academic misconduct incidents), but its Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 42nd overall), and overall attention has not significantly declined. The History Category only offers one major direction, the Law Experimental Class, which is less affected by reputation fluctuations. Law is rated A, one of Shanghai Jiao Tong University's advantageous disciplines, directly corresponding to the History Category enrollment major (Law Experimental Class).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major has a social popularity rating of recommended (slightly hot), with basically stable application popularity in recent years. The number of History Category examinees in Jiangsu Province increased from about 95,000 in 2021 to about 97,000 in 2025, and is estimated to be about 140,000 in 2026 based on a History Category proportion of about 27%, showing a slight expansion. The provincial control line (History Category undergraduate batch) rose from 476 points in 2021 to 482 points in 2025, overall stable. Shanghai is geographically adjacent to Jiangsu, and Shanghai Jiao Tong University has strong regional appeal to Jiangsu History Category examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as stable historical rankings, flat enrollment plans, and stable Law major popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to the 2025 baseline (competition slightly eases). The predicted minimum ranking is about 106, with a range of 56–156.

- Law Experimental Class (Law) (International Rule of Law Special Class) (new direction in 2026).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The History Category only recruits one major category, Law Experimental Class (including two directions), with very few enrollment spots (only 2 people). Rankings need to be within the predicted range of 56–156 to have a greater chance of admission. Shanghai Jiao Tong University's Law is an A-level discipline with slightly hot social popularity. It is recommended that examinees with rankings better than 100 actively apply, and those with rankings in the 100–159 range can use it as a sprint choice.
